doctrine.goal: Module 07 must not drift from Postgres-first telemetry assumptions; SQLite is fallback only.

runtime_constant.name: LIONLOCK_DB_CANONICAL
notes: Real deployments inject DSN via token pipeline or environment.

only_when: DB resolves to Postgres by default
behavior: Emit warning: local-only logs not synced

forbidden: silent fallback to SQLite when Postgres is available
defaulting to SQLite in any online/connected scenario

notes: Log minimal metadata for future migration only.

must_fail_loud: No DB resolved after override order
SQLite becomes default in an online context
must_warn: SQLite fallback engaged due to offline/no-postgres
Local logs will not sync until future tooling exists

compatibility_guardrails: Preserve shared SQL event vocabulary and schema assumptions from Modules 04–06.
Stamp policy_version + config_hash consistently for replay compatibility.
Do not introduce SQLite-only assumptions into shared logging helpers.

db_writes: events (Postgres normally; SQLite only if fallback engaged)
missed_signal_events (Postgres normally; SQLite only if fallback engaged)

non_goals: Do not redesign Modules 04–06 in this pass.
Do not implement SQLite->Postgres sync now.
